  • Uses of EntityMemory in me.gamercoder215.mobchip

    Methods in me.gamercoder215.mobchip with parameters of type EntityMemory
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default boolean
    EntityBrain.containsAllMemories​(@NotNull EntityMemory<?>... memories)
    Whether this Brain contains all of these memories.
    boolean
    EntityBrain.containsMemory​(@NotNull EntityMemory<?> memory)
    Whether this Brain contains this memory.
    long
    EntityBrain.getExpiration​(@NotNull EntityMemory<?> memory)
    Get the expiration date of this Memory.
    <T> T
    EntityBrain.getMemory​(@NotNull EntityMemory<T> memory)
    Fetch the Memory that is stored in this Entity's Brain.
    <T> void
    EntityBrain.setMemory​(@NotNull EntityMemory<T> memory, T value)
    Sets a permanent memory into this entity's brain.
    <T> void
    EntityBrain.setMemory​(@NotNull EntityMemory<T> memory, T value, long expire)
    Sets a temporary memory into this entity's brain.
    Method parameters in me.gamercoder215.mobchip with type arguments of type EntityMemory
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    EntityBrain.setMemories​(@NotNull Map<EntityMemory,​?> map)
    Sets multiple permanent memories into this Entity's Brain.
    default void
    EntityBrain.setMemories​(@NotNull Map<EntityMemory,​?> map, long expire)
    Sets multiple temporary memories into this Entity's Brain.

  • Uses of EntityMemory in me.gamercoder215.mobchip.ai.behavior

    Methods in me.gamercoder215.mobchip.ai.behavior with parameters of type EntityMemory
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @NotNull BehaviorResult
    EntityBehavior.eraseIf​(@NotNull Predicate<Mob> function, @NotNull EntityMemory<?> memory)
    Erases a memory if function returns true.
    @NotNull BehaviorResult
    EntityBehavior.passiveIf​(@NotNull EntityMemory<?> memory, int durationTicks)
    Makes this Entity become Passive is a Memory is present.
